description: CompositionWhite and Grey printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a slit neck with a buttoned chest placket, printed panels on the chest and shoulders wit stitch detailing, short sleeves and slit side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this white printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this stylish kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
